title: Moon Cat deals 2x Atk damage to Were-named creatures

card.rawText: This card inflicts 2x Atk damage to any creature with "Were" in its name. It also receives the effects of the "Full Moon" magic card.

plan.summary: Battle Moon Cat into a Were-named target and verify the 2x attack damage multiplier applies.

notes: Opponent target has Were in its name.

steps: Start battle with Moon Cat into Were-named target.
